# Cafe 88

> Family-run café in El Cajon, California serving organic açaí bowls, hand-folded crepes, real Turkish coffee, milkshakes, and desserts. Order pickup or delivery through DoorDash, Uber Eats, or Grubhub.

Cafe 88 is located at 737 Jamacha Rd, El Cajon, CA 92019. Phone: (619) 312-1077. Owner: Kevin. Catering is available throughout San Diego County.

## Order

- [DoorDash](https://www.doordash.com/store/cafe-88-el-cajon-799384): Order delivery
- [Uber Eats](https://www.ubereats.com/store/cafe-88/GMmqPXDaSSeL9ox29TyUWg): Order delivery
- [Grubhub](https://www.grubhub.com/restaurant/cafe-88-737-jamacha-road-el-cajon/1670792): Order pickup or delivery

## Signature

- Açaí bowls: Paradise, Hawaiian, Lit, Glow, Power, Make Your Own
- Crepes: International Mix, French Style, Nutella Pistachio, Kinder Mini Pancakes
- Milkshakes: Lotus, Pistachio
- Beverages: Turkish Coffee, Glow Green Smoothie
- Desserts: Nutella Sushi Rolls, Cream Puffs, Chocolate Covered Strawberries, Belgian Waffles

## Social

- [Instagram @wecafe88](https://www.instagram.com/wecafe88/)
- [Facebook /wecafe88](https://www.facebook.com/wecafe88)
